docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT'S MAILING ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF YING, ASHLEY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-29-2013 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "RESERVE A RULING ON VENUE CHALLENGE. UNTIL DEFENDANT IS PROPERLY SERVED", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YING, ASHLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MINKOFF, STEVEN $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $665.00, DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED. IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN JUNE 3, 2013, RETURN TO PLAINTIFF A MINITURE DACHSHUND DOG, RYSE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
